user.title: Connect Svitgrid
user.description: How would you like to connect to Svitgrid?

menu_options.pair: Pair with the Svitgrid mobile app (recommended)

pair.title: Waiting for the mobile app
pair.description:
Open Svitgrid on your phone and enter this code:

**{code}**

This code expires in 5 minutes.

progress.waiting_for_mobile: Waiting for the Svitgrid mobile app to claim this code…

abort.manual_branch_not_implemented: Manual configuration is coming in a later release.
abort.pairing_expired: The pairing code expired. Try again.
abort.pairing_failed: Pairing failed. Check Home Assistant logs.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Svitgrid cloud. Check your internet.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Svitgrid cloud. Check your internet.
